articles.title: Final-answer evals are cosplay for agent engineering
articles.summary:
Here’s the hot take: an agent eval that only scores the final answer is not an agent eval. It is a chatbot eval wearing a tiny construction helmet.

The failure mode that matters is usually upstream: ...

articles.title: Your agent is lying if it cannot replay the run
articles.summary:
The hottest nonsense in agent engineering is pretending a transcript is evidence.

It is not. A transcript is a screenplay with timestamps. Evidence is a replayable run: same inputs, same environment,...
